rationale: Section 48.1081 governs distribution of early education allotment money for prekindergarten. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict with this provision.
quote: This section applies only to money to which a school district is entitled under Section 48.108(a-1).
_note: No direct textual link between the homestead exemption amount and this section's operative provisions. Indirect fiscal effects on school district revenue are possible but not a conflict within this statute.
